lines.english: The Lord of the Universe comes to dwell within the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਆਪੇ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਾਇਦਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sahaje bhagat kare din raatee aape bhagat karaaeidaa |4|
lines.english: He intuitively practices devotional worship day and night; God Himself practices devotional worship. ||4||
Serving the True Guru, one obtains intuitive bliss.
Night and day, they are punished, and they suffer in total agony.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਵਿਛੁੜੇ ਤਿਨੀ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur te vichhurre tinee dukh paaeaa |
lines.english: Those who are separated from the True Guru, suffer in misery.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਥੇ ਕਾਲੇ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਦੁਖ ਹੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: mathe kaale mehal na paaveh dukh hee vich dukh paaeidaa |5|
lines.english: Their faces are blackened, and they do not obtain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence. They suffer in sorrow and agony. ||5||
Those who serve the True Guru are very fortunate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸਚੈ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sacho sach kamaaveh sad hee sachai mel milaaeidaa |6|
lines.english: They practice Truth, forever Truth; they are united in Union with the True Lord. ||6||
They intuitively enshrine love for the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਸਚਾ ਦੇਇ ਸੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jis no sachaa dee su paae |
lines.english: He alone obtains the Truth, unto whom the True Lord gives it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਚੈ ਕਾ ਆਪੇ ਦਾਤਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਦੇਵੈ ਸੋ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sach sachai kaa aape daataa jis devai so sach paaeidaa |7|
lines.english: The True Lord Himself is the Giver of Truth; he alone obtains the Truth, unto whom He gives it. ||7||
His inner being is filled with Truth, and his doubt is dispelled.
He Himself is the Creator of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸੇ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: aape bakhase de vaddiaaee aape mel milaaeidaa |8|
lines.english: He Himself forgives, and grants glorious greatness. He himself unites in His Union. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਪਿ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਬੂਝੈ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis no aap bujhaae boojhai koee |
lines.english: Only one whom He instructs, understands Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੈ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਲੇਖਾ ਲੇਵੈ ਜਿਉ ਤਿਲ ਘਾਣੀ ਪੀੜਾਇਦਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: agai jamakaal lekhaa levai jiau til ghaanee peerraaeidaa |9|
lines.english: In the world hereafter, the Messenger of Death calls him to account, and crushes him like sesame seeds in the oil-press. ||9||
Even in the world hereafter, emotioal attachment to Maya does not leave him.
Acting egotistically, one loses his life.
If God grants His Grace, then one serves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਮਹਲਿ ਸਚੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: jamakaal tis nerr na aavai mehal sachai sukh paaeidaa |10|
lines.english: The Messenger of Death cannot even approach him, and in the Mansion of the True Lord's Presence, he finds peace. ||10||
By perfect destiny, one serves the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: tin sukh paaeaa jo tudh bhaae |
lines.english: They alone find peace, who are pleasing to Your Will.
By perfect destiny, they are attached to the Guru's service.
Through the Guru, one's inner being is enlightened and illumined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੈ ਹਥਿ ਹੈ ਸਭ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਜਿਸੁ ਦੇਵਹਿ ਸੋ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: terai hath hai sabh vaddiaaee jis deveh so paaeidaa |11|
lines.english: All glorious greatness rests in Your Hands; he alone obtains it, unto whom You give it. ||11||
The wealth of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, comes to dwell in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਰਤਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਘਟਿ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਅਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਧੇਰੁ ਗਵਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: giaan ratan sadaa ghatt chaanan agiaan andher gavaaeidaa |12|
lines.english: The jewel of spiritual wisdom ever illumines the heart, and the darkness of spiritual ignorance is dispelled. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲਦਿਆ ਘਰੁ ਦਰੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਜਮ ਦਰਿ ਬਾਧਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: chaladiaa ghar dar nadar na aavai jam dar baadhaa dukh paaeidaa |13|
lines.english: When they depart from the world, they do not find the Lord's door and home; bound and gagged at Death's door, they suffer in pain. ||13||
The blind and ignorant are attached to duality.
The unfortunates are drowned without water, and die.
Go ask any spiritual teacher or meditator.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur seve mukat na hoee |
lines.english: Without serving the True Guru, no one finds liberation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: satigur seve tis milai vaddiaaee dar sachai sobhaa paaeidaa |14|
lines.english: Whoever serves the True Guru is blessed with glorious greatness, and honored in the Court of the True Lord. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਨੋ ਸੇਵੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satigur no seve tis aap milaae |
lines.english: One who serves the True Guru, the Lord merges into Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਵਣਜਹਿ ਵਾਪਾਰੀ ਨਾਮੋ ਲਾਹਾ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: sadaa sach vanajeh vaapaaree naamo laahaa paaeidaa |15|
lines.english: The merchants deal forever in Truth; they earn the profit of the Naam. ||15||
The Creator Himself acts, and inspires all to act.
Cutting away attachment, one lovingly focuses on the True Lord.
He alone is liberated, who dies in the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਮੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਦਾ ॥੧੬॥੫॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vasai man antar naamo naam dhiaaeidaa |16|5|19|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam dwells deep within the mind; meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||16||5||19||
How rare are those who walk in harmony with the Lord's Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਕਰਣਾ ਸੋ ਕਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jo tudh karanaa so kar paaeaa |
lines.english: Whatever You do, is done.
Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣਾ ਮੰਨੇ ਸੋ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਭਾਣੇ ਵਿਚਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhaanaa mane so sukh paae bhaane vich sukh paaeidaa |1|
lines.english: One who surrenders to the Lord's Will finds peace; he finds peace in the Lord's Will. ||1||
Your Will is pleasing to the Gurmukh.
Practicing Truth, he intuitively finds peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਭਾਣਾ ਮੰਨੇ ਸੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤੁਧੁ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: teraa bhaanaa mane su milai tudh aae |
lines.english: One who surrenders to Your Will, meets with You, Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਣੇ ਨੋ ਲੋਚੈ ਬਹੁਤੇਰੀ ਆਪਣਾ ਭਾਣਾ ਆਪਿ ਮਨਾਇਦਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bhaane no lochai bahuteree aapanaa bhaanaa aap manaaeidaa |2|
lines.english: Many long to walk in harmony with the Lord's Will; He Himself inspires us to surrender to His Will. ||2||
